examples: The expression of thymidylate synthase may be one of the important prognostic indicator for endometrial carcinoma.
The researchers suggest that such phenomena might even have prognostic value.
Study Design. A randomized controlled trial with multivariable analyses of prognostic factors.
The goal: a gene-based prognostic test, one that could predict years in advance which tumor will metastasize and kill you.
In their prognostic framing, they point to the harm the Kyoto Protocol and all regulation will do to the economy.
